title: oplismenus compositus var. intermedius
intro: Oplismenus compositus var. intermedius is a lesser-known variety of the Oplismenus compositus plant, also known as barbed grass or basket grass, which is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used in folk medicine, and it is believed to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oplismenus compositus var. intermedius include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
